title: atractylis macrocephala
intro: Atractylis macrocephala, also known as Japanese thistle or umbrella thistle, is a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly the sesquiterpene lactone, which is known for its anti-inflammatory and antipyretic effects. Consuming Atractylis macrocephala may provide health benefits such as relieving pain and reducing fever, as well as aiding in the treatment of various conditions, including rheumatism and bronchitis. Atractylis macrocephala can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to utilize its medicinal properties.
